evidence: frontend/src/components/OnboardingPerformance.tsx — dynamic data-bubble-id={stepCopy.headingBubbleId} (bTHfG/bTHfK/bTHfM/bTHfL/bTHfQ) plus bTHOZ/bTGNh/bTGNn/bTHVW answer tree
frontend/src/pages/Onboarding.tsx — step wrappers bTHMo/bTHRN/bTHfq/bTHkb via ONBOARDING_STEP_BUBBLE_GROUPS
frontend/src/lib/userProfile.tsx — persistOnboardingDraft merges role_type, primary_pillar, onboarding_data
frontend/src/pages/Onboarding.tsx — role/pillar/performance/orientation onNext persist draft then goNext; step components disable Continue until valid selection

functional_audit.check: Role step renders five customer_role_os options; Continue disabled until selection
Pillar step renders three customer_pillar_os options; Continue disabled until selection
Performance step shows role-keyed heading, caption, and five questions for selected role
Orientation step renders five scale answers; Continue disabled until selection
Role, pillar, performance, and orientation answers persist onboarding draft on continue

ui_evidence.notes: Wizard subtree root via OnboardingWizardShell / step routing
pro role heading; student/caregiver/transition/retired swap to bTHfK/bTHfM/bTHfL/bTHfQ via stepCopy.headingBubbleId

critiques.finding: Performance step dimension caption ('PuP 360 Dimension 2 of 3 · Universal all roles') is hardcoded JSX rather than sourced from IR/Bubble presentation metadata, unlike role-keyed headings now in PERFORMANCE_STEP_CAPTIONS.
critiques.alternative: Extract dimension label copy to onboardingQuestions.ts or a shared step-chrome helper alongside Stability/Alignment dimension captions for traceability.

critiques.finding: onboardingQuestions.ts declares OnboardingScaleAnswer and OnboardingScaleQuestion twice (lines 9–22 and 525–538); harmless but noisy for maintainers.
critiques.alternative: Remove the duplicate interface block on next edit to onboardingQuestions.ts (ENUM-02 triage defer).

rewrite_verification.detail: OnboardingPerformance.tsx now resolves role via resolvePerformanceRole(role), loads stepCopy via getPerformanceStepCopyForRole(resolvedRole), and binds data-bubble-id={stepCopy.headingBubbleId} with {stepCopy.heading}/{stepCopy.caption} — no hardcoded pro-only copy remains.
